title: Evangelion 30 Poster
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Poster             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:47 am Found this so I thought I'd share: Please discuss!

[]: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:49 am It's a 'shop.

[]: Re: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:51 am Nonoriri wrote: It's a 'shop.

[]: Re: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:52 am cd603 wrote: Provide evidence...

[]: Re: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:55 am Nonoriri wrote: The fact that 3.0 does not have a poster for one.

[]: Re: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 1:05 am cd603 wrote: who's to say this isn't the real one?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Nov 21, 2010 1:13 am if the real 3.0 poster came out, the news about it would be everywhere

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Nov 21, 2010 1:22 am This is fan-made poster has been around for some time.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Nov 21, 2010 1:23 am It's poorly retouched. Note closely where the other Children should be standing -- lots of blurs, too (see 2.0 poster for comparison). Even the 3.0 lettering doesn't look right.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 21, 2010 1:24 am As nice a visual gag as that poster is, I kind of wish someone had gone to the trouble of doing the inverse photoshop job.

[]:             Quote Post by TonyTH » Sun Nov 21, 2010 2:19 am My guess is 3.0 will have even more characters on it than 2.0, and 4.0 will have no one in it because of 3rd Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 2:45 am TonyTH wrote: My guess is 3.0 will have even more characters on it than 2.0, and 4.0 will have no one in it because of 3rd Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 21, 2010 3:08 am There's a bunch of poster shops in the fan art thread.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0 Poster             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 21, 2010 3:51 am cd603 wrote: Found this so I thought I'd share

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 21, 2010 4:21 am Just so I don't forget the link later, here's one of the places that the image popped up. The post dated at "2009/07/09" http://warasoku.blog18.fc2.com/blog-entry-1023.html

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Sun Nov 21, 2010 6:12 am I think it's pretty clear that this poster symbolizes that as long as Shinji has his right hand, he will still be happy, everything else is just a bonus.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:17 pm Naminator wrote: I think it's pretty clear that this poster symbolizes that as long as Shinji has his right hand, he will still be happy, everything else is just a bonus.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:18 pm Obviously yes.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:21 pm If you consider these two Shinji's to be enough of the same, and by extension DAT HAND to be the same too...

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:24 pm BiQ wrote: If you consider these two Shinji's to be enough of the same, and by extension DAT HAND to be the same too...
summary:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Poster             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:47 am Found this so I thought I'd share: Please discuss!

[]: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:49 am It's a 'shop.

[]: Re: Meaning that it is clearly fake.             Quote Post by cd603
